hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO" ]; then ESLINT_OUT=$(cd "$REPO" && npx eslint "$FILE" --max-warnings 0 2>&1); STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -ne 0 ]; then echo "$ESLINT_OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "$REPO/src"; then TSC_OUT=$(cd "$REPO" && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit 2>&1); STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors:\n$TSC_OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.tsx$'; then REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "$REPO/src"; then if grep -qE '>\s*[A-Z][a-z].{10,}' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Invoke the instui-ux-copy skill on any new human-visible strings before proceeding. Inform the user only if you decide to run the skill. "}}' "$FILE"; fi; fi; fi
